meta.title: Rental portal
meta.description: Online booking via Bond public APIs

common.precheckoutSummaryFootnote: Discounts and fees are calculated in your cart when you pay.

errors.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.illegalPrice: Price issue with {who} on {prod}. Try different times or add-ons, or contact the venue if this keeps happening.
errors.illegalPriceMerge: Adding to an existing cart can use different unit prices than the schedule; try finishing this booking first or starting a new cart.
errors.notEligible: {who} isn’t eligible for this product. Try a different service or contact {org} if you believe this is a mistake.
errors.invalidProductGeneric: We couldn’t complete this booking with the selected options. Try different times or remove some add-ons, or contact the venue if this keeps happening.
errors.bookingTooSoon: That start time is too soon for online booking—this venue needs more advance notice. Pick a later time or day, or contact the venue.
errors.maxBookableHoursForDay: {who} has reached the maximum bookable hours for this day. Try another day, different times, or a shorter booking.
errors.maxSequentialHoursToday: {who} has reached the limit for sequential (back-to-back) hours booked today. Try a shorter session, a gap between times, or another day.

booking.participantLockedTitle: Participant can’t be changed after you continue past the first checkout step.
booking.slotsSelectedCompleteBooking: {count, plural, one {# slot selected — Complete booking} other {# slots selected — Complete booking}}
booking.loadingPortal: Cooking up some rentals for you…
booking.signInHintTail: to see availability, pricing, and eligibility based on your membership.
booking.whenSectionLabel: Date, duration, and preferred start time
booking.openCalendarPickDate: Open calendar to pick an available date
booking.envMissingLine1: Set {orgKey} and {portalKey} in {envFile}, or open with ?orgId=…&portalId=… in the URL.
sportsFacts: The fastest recorded tennis serve topped 163 mph.
A soccer field can be up to 120 yards long in international play.
Volleyball was invented in 1895 as a gentler alternative to basketball.
Pickleball was named after the family dog, Pickles.
Indoor tracks are banked so sprinters don’t fly into the stands.
The first basketball hoops were peach baskets—no hole in the bottom.
Futsal uses a smaller, heavier ball to keep touches sharp.
Badminton shuttles can leave a racket at over 200 mph.
booking.bookingForSubtitle: Pricing, benefits and available options may vary by person.
booking.changeParticipantClearBody: You have slots selected. Do you want to keep them or clear them when switching participants?
booking.memberAccessTitle: This person has a qualifying membership for this rental product and can use member pricing.
booking.needsMembershipTitle: This person still needs a qualifying membership for this product. You can add it at checkout.
booking.whatToBook: What would you like to book?
booking.slotAlreadyBookedForParticipant: {who} already has a booking that overlaps this time on this court.
booking.slotValidationMaxPerDay: {who} can book at most {maxHours} hours on this day, including hours already on the schedule.
booking.slotValidationMaxSequential: Back-to-back bookings for {who} are limited to {maxHours} hours at a time, including existing bookings today.
booking.vipEarlyAccessHint: May be available with VIP early access when you sign in (if eligible)
booking.vipEarlyAccessFooter: Sign in to see VIP early access (if eligible)
booking.productDetailDescriptionFallback: Description will appear when opened in the browser.
booking.productDetailScheduleBlurb: Times shown are for the facility and product you selected. Pick a date to see open slots.

checkout.pricingStale: Pricing may be out of date. Retry to refresh.
checkout.preparingPricing: Dotting the i’s on your price…
checkout.mergeBlocked: We couldn’t read a cart id from your saved bookings, so another reservation can’t be merged yet. Clear the cart and try again, or refresh the page.
checkout.depositModalBody: Choose how much to pay today. Payment processing will connect here next.
checkout.cartHeroSubtitle: Review your bookings and totals, then continue to pay.
checkout.addedToCartSubtitle: Your booking is completed. You can pay now or add another booking before payment.
checkout.bookingSummaryReviewHint: Review your selections before adding to cart
checkout.precheckoutPricingNote: Discounts and fees are calculated in your cart when you pay.
checkout.bookingConfirmedSubtitle: Your booking has been successfully completed
checkout.bookingConfirmedSubtitleSubmit: Your request was sent to the facility. Watch your email for updates.
checkout.feesMayApplyTooltip: Fees depend on how you pay. Pick a payment method at checkout to see what applies.
checkout.mixedCartPolicyBanner: Some items in your cart are charged now. Others need facility approval and may be charged later once approved.
checkout.confirmationEmailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to {email}
checkout.confirmationEmailGeneric: A confirmation email has been sent to your account email.
checkout.addPaymentWhenAvailable: Add a payment method when available
checkout.cartGroupedByPerson: Bookings are grouped by person. Each section below is for a different family member.
checkout.approvalNoticeBag: Rentals and addons are submitted for facility review. Membership charges are handled separately.
checkout.approvalBannerBody: Some items in your cart require approval from the facility and will be charged if approved.
checkout.depositBannerBody: Some items in your cart require a deposit per quantity. The min deposit is required to secure your booking.
checkout.taxDiscountsCheckoutNote: Taxes, fees and discounts apply in checkout
checkout.purchasesGroupedByMember: Purchases are grouped by family member. Review each section before submitting.
checkout.payEndpointPlaceholderTitle: Purchase / pay endpoint not yet in public API — wire when Bond exposes it
checkout.addonsHintWithSelection: Your extras from the schedule are listed below. Adjust if needed, then continue.
checkout.addonsHintOptional: Optional extras for this service appear below when available.
checkout.requiredConfirmHint: Confirm each required item before continuing.
checkout.membershipRequiredBlurb: A membership is required for this booking. Continue to choose a plan on the next step.
checkout.transactionFeesDetail: Transaction fees may apply depending on payment method.
checkout.bondAmountsDetail: Amounts come from Bond when the API returns them on each cart.
checkout.peakPricingHint: Prices vary by time; peak windows may cost more than the range shown.
checkout.membershipPanelLead: This service requires a membership. Select one below to complete your booking.
checkout.membershipProductsAddedOne: 1 product will be added with your booking.
checkout.membershipProductsAddedMany: {count} products will be added with your booking.
checkout.waiverOnFile: Waiver on file from {date}. Check the box below to confirm it applies to this booking.
checkout.waiverScrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to acknowledge.
checkout.waiverFallback: Review the terms above, then confirm below.
checkout.waiverAgree: I have read and agree to the terms above

schedule.productUnavailableOnResource: This product isn't available on {resource} at this time. Try a different date.
schedule.matrixSlotMissingAria: No opening at {time} — booked or unavailable for this resource

addons.applyByHour: Apply by time slot (price scales with length)
addons.reservationHint: One charge for this booking (applies to the times you already selected).
addons.panelHeading: Enhance your booking with optional add-ons

auth.tosNote: By continuing, you agree to Bond Sports' Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
